theme.description: Inspired by Opera Cloud and Mews, modified with Super 8 brand accents for a premium, clean, high-efficiency interface. The system serves three distinct surfaces with specialized aesthetics.
global_rules: No placeholder data; system starts empty.
Data must be clearly formatted with generous whitespace on desktop, and high-contrast dense layouts on mobile.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

monospace.usage: Data tables, receipts, cash payouts, inventory counts.

main_web.name: Main Web System
main_web.layout: Sidebar navigation (icons only, not top nav). Responsive down to tablet.
main_web.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for main cards. gap-6 for grid layouts.

components.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-16 bg-slate-900 text-white flex flex-col items-center py-6 gap-8 z-50
components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 p-6
components.room_grid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 xl:grid-cols-8 gap-4
components.room_card: relative p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors cursor-pointer min-h-[100px] flex flex-col justify-between
components.status_badge: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider inline-flex items-center
components.ai_chat: min-h-[400px] bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-200 rounded-b-2xl flex flex-col

bar_app.name: Bar Staff Mobile PWA
bar_app.layout: Large touch-friendly mobile layout. Dimly lit environment optimized.
bar_app.spacing: Tight container padding but massive hit areas for touch interactions. Full-width scrollable cards.

components.card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-4 w-full mb-4 shadow-xl
components.numpad: grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 w-full max-w-[400px] mx-auto mt-6
components.numpad_button: h-20 text-3xl font-bold bg-zinc-800 active:bg-zinc-700 text-white rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-zinc-700/50 shadow-md touch-manipulation transition-all active:scale-95
components.primary_action: h-16 bg-[#CC0000] hover:bg-[#A30000] active:bg-[#800000] text-white text-xl font-bold rounded-2xl w-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,0,0,0.3)]
components.input_display: h-20 bg-zinc-900 border-b-2 border-zinc-700 text-right text-4xl font-mono text-white px-4 flex items-center justify-end font-bold rounded-t-xl

owner_app.name: Owner Mobile PWA
owner_app.layout: Dashboard-first layout, read-only, pull-to-refresh on every screen.
owner_app.spacing: Bento grid aesthetic on mobile, card-based layout.

components.metric_card: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 flex flex-col gap-2
components.chart_container: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-slate-100 mt-4

interactive_rules.hover_states: Subtle opacity or scale changes. All interactive web elements MUST explicitly change appearance on hover.
interactive_rules.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height on all mobile interfaces (bar_app and owner_app).
interactive_rules.animations: Use Framer Motion for smooth transitions (dialogs, tabs, numpad press).
